title: David Schick | Chief of Business Operations at Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Chief of Business Operations
Request A Consultation
David Schick is Chief of Business Operations at Colombo & Hurd. Mr. Schick brings more than 25 years of senior leadership experience across global banking, insurance, and wealth management, with a career built on operational excellence and P&L growth. His work centers on leading organizations through complex strategic and structural change.
Before joining Colombo & Hurd, Mr. Schick held Chief Operating Officer, transformation, and Profit and Loss (P&L) leadership roles at some of the world's largest and most complex financial institutions, operating across more than 50 countries. His experience spans corporate, retail, and transaction banking; commercial, personal, and specialty insurance and reinsurance; wealth management; and family office platforms. He has driven multi-billion-dollar Mergers and Acquisitions (M&A) transactions as well as enterprise-wide digital modernization and AI-enabled transformation programs.
At Colombo & Hurd, Mr. Schick leads the firm's business strategy and growth operations, partnering with firm leadership to strengthen organizational performance, operational infrastructure, and long-term commercial direction.

## Knowledge & Experience
- M.B.A. in Corporate Finance and International Business, Marshall School of Business, University of Southern California
- B.A. in Economics, DePauw University ( Distinguished Pullman Scholar )

### Professional Focus & Technical Expertise
- Enterprise Transformation & Operating Model Design
- COO & Global Banking and Insurance Operations
- P&L Growth & Balance Sheet Management
- Digital, Data & Technology Modernization
- M&A, Integrations & Divestitures
- Operational Excellence, Cost Optimization & Productivity Improvement
- Wealth, Banking & Family Office Platforms
- Multi-Country Risk, Regulatory & Governance
- Lean Six Sigma Black Belt
- Credit-trained corporate banker with regulated status across multiple jurisdictions
Mr. Schick recently moved to Florida with his family. He is married with two children and enjoys playing golf.
